lenses.guidance: vv 1-51 reproduces the form of Num 1's census but with the new generation. The structure is not redundant — it's covenant accounting. Same tribes, fresh names, renewed roster. The form witnesses that the wilderness verdict has run its course.

vv 64-65's note — 'not one of them was among those counted by Moses and Aaron... for the LORD had told those Israelites they would surely die in the wilderness' — closes a covenant chapter. The redemptive arc continues with the next generation.
